commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a `sandbox.docker.hostMountPrefixMap` setting and uses it to rewrite Docker sandbox workspace, skill, and custom bind source paths for DooD deployments.

PR surface: Source +66. Total +66 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not as a live run: current mount builders pass Gateway-container paths to Docker, while the host Docker daemon resolves sources on the host in DooD deployments. I did not run an actual DooD Gateway container reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer/security review plus contributor real behavior proof; automation should not repair or merge this external PR while the proof gate is insufficient and the config/security direction is unsettled.

target.title: [Bug] Fix: Sandbox materialized skills fail to mount when Gateway runs in a Docker container (DooD)
target.author: ajwan8998
